meaning: 沃尔索耳[英国英格兰中部城市]
examples: Paul Merson did not last at Walsall.
The firm had a major storehouse attached to its factory in Walsall.
Anthony started out as a youth player at Everton before making a real name for himself at Walsall.
It is also building a relationship with Walsall College, which has been rated as outstanding.
Walsall Healthcare NHS Trust said two nurses, a porter and a receptionist had been dismissed.
